prompt_text:
### Demographics: 56-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); Peripheral artery disease
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 54.1 kg; Height 165.5 cm; BMI 19.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 118/66 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.8%; 9 months ago 9.2%; 6 months ago 8.7%; 3 months ago 8.2%; current 7.8%), FPG (12 months ago 264mg/dL; 9 months ago 241mg/dL; 6 months ago 209mg/dL; 3 months ago 190mg/dL; current 211mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 53.1kg; 9 months ago 52.3kg; 6 months ago 51.7kg; 3 months ago 52.7kg; current 54.1kg), Height (12 months ago 165.5cm; 9 months ago 165.5cm; 6 months ago 165.5cm; 3 months ago 165.5cm; current 165.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 19.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 122mmHg; 9 months ago 121mmHg; 6 months ago 121mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 118mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 65mmHg; 9 months ago 64mmHg; 6 months ago 65mmHg; 3 months ago 67mmHg; current 66mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 44U/L; 9 months ago 44U/L; 6 months ago 43U/L; 3 months ago 52U/L; current 50U/L), AST (12 months ago 49U/L; 9 months ago 47U/L; 6 months ago 40U/L; 3 months ago 40U/L; current 47U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 44mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; current 40mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 202mg/g; 9 months ago 214mg/g; 6 months ago 166mg/g; 3 months ago 259mg/g; current 234mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 75mg/dL; 6 months ago 78mg/dL; 3 months ago 72mg/dL; current 76mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 49mg/dL; 6 months ago 50mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 126mg/dL; 9 months ago 147mg/dL; 6 months ago 143mg/dL; 3 months ago 148mg/dL; current 138mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.9g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.91 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
